## TRM1.3. Adherence to ATFM slots (PI#1)

ATFM slot adherence in 2025 was equal to 99.2%, very close to 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 99.6%. This is the highest among all RP4 states.

The main airport, Bucharest Otopeni, achieved 99.5% adherence and all individual airports achieved \>97.5% adherence.

With regard to the 0.8% of flights that did not adhere, 0.6% were early and 0.2% were late.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM slot adherence across Member States in 2025 was 96.1%.
